name: chacha20_rng_sequences_v1
description: ChaCha20Rng state tracking and deterministic sequence generation patterns

entries.notes: ChaCha20Rng state transitions: seed initialization, sequence generation, state comparison, state divergence, and snapshot/restore replay patterns

seed_initialization.description: Initial RNG state from 256-bit seed bytes via ChaCha20Rng::from_seed

sequence_generation.description: RNG state advancement after generating N values; word_pos and step_count tracking

state_comparison.description: Two identically-seeded RNGs performing identical call sequences produce identical state

state_divergence.description: Same seed, different call type ordering causes state divergence

snapshot_restore.description: Snapshot-restore replay: outputs after restore match outputs from original position

provenance.review_notes: Technical training data for ChaCha20Rng state tracking in adapterOS deterministic execution engine. Seeds derived from HKDF; word_pos advances by 1 per u32 (4 bytes), by 2 per u64 (8 bytes).

evaluation_gates: Identical seed + identical call sequence => identical RNG state 100% of the time
word_pos advances by 1 for each u32 generated (4 bytes = 1 ChaCha20 word)
word_pos advances by 2 for each u64 generated (8 bytes = 2 ChaCha20 words)
step_count increments by 1 for each next_u32() call, by 1 for each next_u64() call
Snapshot restore returns word_pos and step_count to snapshotted values
Different call type ordering with same seed produces divergent word_pos
